vllm.title: [Core] Make raw_request optional in ServingCompletion
vllm.author: schoennenbeck
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR simply ports the logic that is already used in OpenAIServingChat to OpenAIServingCompletion to make passing the raw_request optional.

vllm.title: [VLM] Merged multi-modal processor and V1 support for Qwen-VL
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
(Not to be confused with Qwen2-VL (which is already supported) and Qwen2.5-VL (not supported yet))

I have tested V1 locally and the model output is basically the same, but not entirely sure why an extra EOS token is being outputted.
V0 output:
# python examples/offline_inference/vision_language.py

vllm.title: [Doc] Fix typo for x86 CPU installation
vllm.author: waltforme
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR fixes a typo in docs/source/getting_started/installation/cpu/x86.inc.md.

vllm.title: [V1][Metrics] Hook up IterationStats for Prometheus metrics
vllm.author: markmc
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Follow on from #12416, part of #10582
Pass IterationStats to the stat logger, and log them in both the logging and prometheus loggers.
For the logging stat logger, we need to calculate the throughput based on the number of tokens in the particular logging interval.
In the prometheus logger, we just

vllm.title: Replace missed warning_once for rerank API
vllm.author: mgoin

vllm.title: Do not run `suggestion` `pre-commit` hook multiple times
vllm.author: hmellor
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Prevents the message To bypass pre-commit hooks, add --no-verify to git commit. from being printed once for each changed file.

vllm.title: [V1][Metrics] Add per-request prompt/generation_tokens histograms
vllm.author: markmc
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Follow on from #12478, part of #10582
Observe these values as requests are finished.
Requires keeping track of generated tokens per-request to handle streaming delta updates.

vllm.title: [Kernel] Pipe attn_logits_soft_cap through paged attention TPU kernels
vllm.author: fenghuizhang
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Pipe attn_logits_soft_cap through paged_attention, this will unblock some of our models' adoption.
Note that the changed code currently doesn't have unit tests. I will add one later.
This is the same as #12294. We created a new PR as I messed up the sign off and previous commit chain.
Thanks,

vllm.title: [TPU] Add example for profiling TPU inference
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Provides an example for simple prefill or decode profiling on TPUs. This is a starting point equivalent to text-only inference using benchmark_latency.py, where all the user can specify is batch size, input length, and output length.
Future work should expand this example to cover realistic data and

vllm.title: [Frontend] Support reasoning content for deepseek r1
vllm.author: gaocegege
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fix #12468
Two CLI arguments are introduced for extensibility: --enable-reasoning and --reasoning-parser.
vllm serve deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-1.5B --enable-reasoning --reasoning-parser deepseek_r1
Test for full request:
from openai import OpenAI
client = OpenAI(
    base_url="http://100.

vllm.title: [Doc] Convert docs to use colon fences
vllm.author: hmellor
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Converts docs to use colon fences instead of backtick fences, as requested in https://vllm-dev.slack.com/archives/C087WACBTHC/p1737623935138279

vllm.title: [V1][Metrics] Add TTFT and TPOT histograms
vllm.author: markmc
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Follow on from #12516, part of #10582
Compute these intervals on the API server side as EngineCoreOutputs are processed.
The OutputProcessor needs to track per-request arrival times and the generation timestamp of the most recent token generation.
Prefill intervals are calculated when the first Engi

vllm.title: Bugfix for whisper quantization due to fake k_proj bias
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Without this change, running a quantized whisper like https://huggingface.co/nm-testing/whisper-large-v2-FP8-dynamic results in a complaint about a non-existent bias_scale

vllm.title: Fix the pydantic logging validator
vllm.author: maxdebayser
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Prevent the validator from logging unused extra fields before object is validated by the pydantic validator.
During the routing based on the request content where pydantic tries several classes for deserialization, this would result in spurious logs.
For example, during in a request like this one:
c
